message:
test(indexer): strengthen empty-watch-scan assertion with get_last_indexed_at

Review pass on the #194 test added in ffd7c3c4:

- Drops the state-lock-held-across-t_index-lock anti-pattern.
- Replaces the "segment_count == 0 transitively proves last_indexed_at
  was not bumped" reasoning with a direct assertion using the new
  `FrankenStorage::get_last_indexed_at` accessor (landed alongside in
  src/storage/sqlite.rs). Direct check is a stronger regression net —
  if a future refactor decouples segment-commit from
  set_last_indexed_at, the old transitive proof silently becomes
  incorrect while the direct assertion keeps holding.

Also includes the companion get_last_indexed_at implementation
(symmetric with the existing set_last_indexed_at / get_last_scan_ts
pair) so the test has a public API to call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
